headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) Valuation Check After FDA Expands ALYFTREK And TRIKAFTA Use
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) is back in focus after the U.S. Food and Drug Administration expanded use of its cystic fibrosis drugs ALYFTREK and TRIKAFTA, significantly widening the eligible treatment population in the U.S. See our latest analysis for Vertex Pharmaceuticals. The FDA label expansions arrive after a softer patch in the share price, with a 30 day share price return of a 3.68% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of a 7.96% decline. However, the 3 year and 5 year total...
